THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RABANAL, SUSANA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 870 GROVE STREET #206, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-10-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 11:59PM ON 6-10-97. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN FEES & COSTS. DEFT WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT. MUTUAL RELEASE. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY, PLTF WILL SIGN STIP TO SET ASIDE & VACATE JUDGMNT IF PREPARED BY DEFT.
